hooks.command: cd "/Users/davidlevy/Desktop/PJ/BIG HEAD" && if git status --porcelain docs/MASTER-BACKUP.md | grep -q .; then git add docs/MASTER-BACKUP.md && git commit -m "auto: session backup $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && echo '{"systemMessage": "✅ MASTER-BACKUP.md salvo localmente (push manual necessário)."}'; fi 2>/dev/null || true
